hero.subtitle: Paste a YouTube link. Veractum extracts the transcript, summarises what was said, and fact-checks every claim — with sources.
hero.trusted: 2 free analyses • No credit card required

videoInput.errorInvalid: Invalid YouTube URL. Please use a youtube.com/watch or youtu.be link.

howItWorks.label: How it Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drop any YouTube URL into Veractum. We support standard watch links, short links, and embedded URLs.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI fetches the transcript, generates a structured summary, extracts claims, and fact-checks each one.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive a comprehensive report with key points, a visual timeline, and every claim rated with sources.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to
features.instantSummaryDesc: Get the key points of any video in seconds. No more scrubbing through hours of content to find what matters.
features.claimExtractionDesc: AI identifies every factual statement, opinion, and prediction — then separates signal from noise.
features.factCheckDesc: Every claim is checked against real sources. See the evidence, not just a verdict.
features.timelineDesc: A colour-coded timeline shows what was discussed and when, so you can jump straight to what matters.

cta.title: Ready to think more
cta.subtitle: Stop guessing what's true. Paste a video, get the facts — with evidence, context, and confidence scores you can trust.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, no surprises.
pricing.contactHint: Need something custom? Contact us at
pricing.observerDesc: Get started with basic video analysis.
pricing.analystDesc: Full fact-checking with sources and history.
pricing.aiModelChoiceTitle: Choose Your AI Model for Analyses
pricing.aiModelChoiceDesc: Veractor users will be able to select their preferred AI model — GPT-4, Gemini, Claude, and more — to customise every analysis.
pricing.faq1Q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
pricing.faq1A: Yes, you can cancel at any time. Your access continues until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq2Q: What happens when I reach my analysis limit?
pricing.faq2A: You'll see a friendly upgrade prompt. Your existing analyses remain accessible. Limits reset each month.
pricing.faq3A: We support English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Chinese, Japanese, and Russian. Free tier is English only.
pricing.faq4A: Our AI extracts claims from the video transcript, then verifies each one against real web sources using advanced search, providing confidence scores and source links.

history.title: Analysis History
history.subtitle: Your past video analyses, sorted by most recent.
history.signInDesc: Your past analyses are saved to your account. Sign in to access them.
history.noAnalysesDesc: Paste a YouTube link on the home page to get started.

analysis.processingNote: This usually takes 15–30 seconds depending on video length.

analysisLoader.note: Analysis can take 1 to 3 minutes depending on video length.

notFound.message: This page doesn't exist — but the truth is still out there.

footer.etymology: From Latin {verus} (true) + {factum} (deed) — the truth of what was said.

meta.title: Veractum — See clearly. Think freely.
meta.description: AI-powered YouTube video analysis. Paste a link, get a structured summary, extracted claims, and AI fact-checking with sources and confidence scores.

auth.signInDesc: Choose a provider to continue. Your analyses will be saved to your account.
auth.signInRequired: You need to sign in to analyse videos. Create a free account in seconds.
auth.termsNotice: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Your Plan
upgrade.description: You've reached the limit of your current plan. Upgrade to unlock more.

extension.title: Coming soon:
extension.description: Fact-check YouTube videos directly from your browser. Get instant claim analysis without leaving the page.
extension.success: You're on the list! We'll notify you when it launches.
extension.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

donate.title: Support Veractum
donate.description: Veractum is free to use. If you find it valuable, consider buying us a coffee to keep the servers running.
donate.comingSoon: Payment integration coming soon. Thank you for your interest!

limits.videoTooLong: Video too long for your plan. Max {max} minutes.
limits.limitReached: Monthly analysis limit reached. Upgrade for more.
limits.languageLocked: Other languages require Analyst plan or higher.
